'''Upthrust Esports - The Patriot Cup''' is a [[Battlegrounds Mobile India|BGMI]] {{FlagNoLink|in}} tournament.

==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
{{BroadcasterCard
|b1=Gamezotech
|b2=Insane Arena
|b3=Aman
}}

===Format===
* '''The Patriot Cup''' : ''January 23rd - 31st
*'''Open Qualifiers'''
** 512 teams.
** Squad , {{Abbr/TPP}}.
**{{bgcolortext|up|Top 5 teams}} qualify for '''Semi Finals''' 
* '''Semi Finals''' : ''January 23rd - 26th
** 24 teams.
** 19 invited teams, 5 teams from '''Open Qualifiers'''.
** 4 matchdays.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for the '''Grand Finals'''.
* '''Grand Finals''' : ''January 28th - 31st
** 16 teams.
** 4 matchdays.


{{PUBGM 2023 Points System|showtb=true}}
